diagrams_decision: APPROVED without diagrams. Two team-lead candidates evaluated: (a) watermark/LRU eviction in §5.4-§5.5 — §5.5.4's 16-block step-by-step demo replay (Initial → A allocates 4 → A caches → A frees → B touch → C allocates) with free-count + cache-size at each step serves as a textual diagram; a figure would be redundant. (b) recompute-vs-swap timeline in §5.6 — the ASCII 7-axis trade-off matrix at lines 626-633 + latency table at lines 614-617 give all the data side-by-side. Neither candidate reads as confusing without a figure. Per Ch04 baseline judgment, no diagram REJECT.
novel_strengths_vs_ch04_baseline: Lint cleaner: 0 non-blocking (Ch04 had 4 inline-density warnings).

Numerics chain longer than Ch04: layout (§5.1.2) → page-size derivation (§5.3.2) → block count (§5.3.3) → block-size sweep (§5.3.4) → LRU replay (§5.5.4) → recompute/swap latency (§5.6.2) — all pinned to live demo output.
Explicit v0/v1 version-history disambiguation (§5.6.4) prevents reader confusion with Kwon et al. 2023 paper.
Engineering-rationale call-outs (deque vs doubly-linked, null block reservation, free-doesn't-clear-cache-hash) are interview-level and tied directly to source-line reasoning.
Page-size formula explained per-multiplier (the '2' for K/V pairing, GQA factor, dtype) — better than just the formula.
non_blocking_observations: Line 557 has narrator stepping through cache-size reasoning ('Let me re-walk... ah'); reads as conversational stream-of-thought but is pedagogically intentional (shows the reader how to reason about the data structure). Not a REJECT.

§5.5.4 step labels say 'A caches blocks 0,1' which means 'A.a_blocks[0] and A.a_blocks[1]' (internal index), with block_id=1 and 2 respectively — the narrative explicitly disambiguates this on line 552.
Forward-pointer for VLLM_MEMORY_PROFILER_ESTIMATE_CUDAGRAPHS to Ch20 is gracefully integrated (line 262 ⚠️ callout).
v6_compliance_alignment: Ch05 matches or exceeds Ch04 baseline on all v6 metrics (lint, tests, demo fidelity, mapping table size, REFERENCE count, 5-step rhythm). Confirms v6 cadence for Ch06+.
